title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: A workflow that routes different application-building phases to different LLMs: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design. The approach leverages each model's strengths by using handoff documents to pass context between phases, enabling cost-efficient full-stack development.
